answer: Hey! I'm here to answer questions about Prashant's background, experience, skills, projects, certifications, and how to get in touch.

patterns: who are you|tell me about yourself|introduce yourself|what's your story|who is prashant
answer: I'm Prashant — a Senior Product Manager with 19 years of experience across financial services, enterprise CRM, and SaaS. PMP, CSPO, Certified Scrum Master, and SAFe certified, and I also build AI-powered applications using modern LLM technologies.

patterns: looking for a job|open to work|job search|seeking|employment|hiring|full.time|new role|new job|is he available|available
answer: Motivated to excel — open to the right opportunity.

patterns: what do you do|your role|current role|day.to.day|^job$
answer: I lead enterprise CRM product strategy — defining roadmaps, partnering with cross-functional teams, and delivering AI-driven automation for large-scale platforms.

Recent work: AI Chat Dashboard, a multi-LLM comparison app with per-response cost and latency metrics; TripFlow, a calendar-aware travel and wellness planner; Smart Portfolio, an AI investment action engine; and a PRD Generator that turns a brief into a structured product requirements doc using Claude.

A PIN-gated Next.js + Supabase app that sends one prompt to multiple LLMs at once via OpenRouter — GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral — and shows every answer side by side with per-response token, cost, and latency metrics. Live at the link in projects; demo PIN available on request.
A calendar-aware travel planning app — finds ideal travel windows around work commitments and recommends destination-specific wellness activities. Live demo linked in projects.
An AI-powered investment assistant — plain-language recommendations on concentration risk, sell timing, and covered calls. Built with FastAPI, React, and Claude — 54/54 automated tests passing.
Turns a simple product brief into a structured PRD using Claude — cuts documentation time from hours to minutes.
Salesforce CRM, Jira, Kafka, Lightning Web Components, Figma on the product side. Claude API, RAG, vector search, prompt engineering, and LLM orchestration on the AI side.

I build AI-native applications with Claude and RAG pipelines — including a multi-agent MCP framework that lets AI agents update Salesforce records in real time. My focus is applied AI: practical LLM systems that automate real workflows.

19 years spanning technical delivery, IT project management, and product leadership — evolving from engineering into enterprise CRM and now AI-enabled product strategy across financial services and SaaS.
PMP certified, Certified Scrum Product Owner (CSPO), Certified Scrum Master (CSM), and SAFe certified.

MBA from the University of California, MS in Information Systems from the University of Maine, MS in Chemical Engineering from West Virginia University, and a BE in Chemical Engineering from Manipal Institute of Technology.
Best way to reach me: prashcareer19@gmail.com — or connect on LinkedIn.
Connect with me on LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/prash9
Explore my projects on GitHub: github.com/psaiquest
Always interested in conversations about product strategy, AI adoption, enterprise CRM, and digital transformation — reach out and let's talk.
